changes: Fix: Raw Data API now handles DateTime64(3) timestamp precision correctly

Added campaign API routes for detection, listing, and review
IOC: Tag Artifacts modal now shows real-time progress bar

Fixed race condition causing case_indexing_complete to trigger multiple times

Added multi-source pattern sync (Hayabusa, SigmaHQ, mdecrevoisier, MITRE CAR, OpenCTI Sigma)

Synced 2,943 executable detection patterns from Hayabusa rules
